name: Easy Chocolate Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chocolate in a large microwave-safe bowl on HIGH for 2 minutes, stirring halfway through heating time until melted.
2. Beat the cream cheese with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth.
3. Gradually beat in powdered sugar until well blended.
4. Stir in the melted chocolate until fully combined.
5. Divide the mixture into thirds and stir in one type of liqueur to each portion.
6. Refrigerate for about 3 hours or until firm, then shape into 1-inch balls.
7. Roll the truffles in chopped nuts, cocoa powder, flake coconut, or colored sprinkles.
8. Store in the refrigerator. Makes approximately 5 dozen.
